overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a narrow cyberpunk food stall kitchen with neon lighting and digital menu boards, approaching an NPC cook working at a griddle station with rising steam.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk food stall kitchen corridor with storage

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the narrow kitchen space past storage boxes and equipment toward the cooking area

entered.detail: cyan-lit digital display showing menu items mounted above the counter
stack of red-rimmed white plates on the stainless steel counter
tall white cylindrical trash bin with metallic lid
stacked cardboard boxes with red branding on the floor
green metal wire shelving unit against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow, industrial cyberpunk kitchen corridor. Digital menu screens and stacks of plates sit on the front counter, while cardboard boxes and metal shelving line the passage. Fluorescent ceiling lights illuminate the concrete floor as the camera advances toward the cooking area in the back.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall cooking station with active griddle

events.description: camera stops moving and focuses on the NPC cook working at the griddle
NPC stirs the frying pan vigorously, causing steam to rise and swirl

agents.ego_description: standing stationary near the cooking station watching the NPC prepare food on the griddle

notable_agents.action: cooking at the griddle station, stirring food in a frying pan with visible steam rising

entered.detail: large flat-top griddle with frying pan and food items being cooked
metal heat lamp suspended above the food warming station
bright pink and blue neon signs visible through the window behind the cooking area
large metallic cooking pot on the left side of the prep area

segments.scene_description: The player stops at the cooking station where an NPC cook is actively preparing food on a griddle. Steam rises from the frying pan as the cook stirs the contents. Bright neon signage glows through the window behind the cooking area, casting colorful light on the industrial kitchen equipment while the player observes the cooking process.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a cramped industrial kitchen that culminates at a vibrant, steaming cooking station. It begins by advancing through a narrow corridor lined with metal shelving and cardboard boxes, passing digital menu screens and stacks of plates on a front counter. As the camera moves deeper into the space under fluorescent ceiling lights, the industrial passage opens up into the main cooking area. The scene then shifts focus to an NPC cook actively stirring food on a griddle, with thick steam rising from the pan. Finally, the perspective settles at the station as bright neon signage from a window behind the cook casts colorful glows across the metallic equipment.
